creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #6)

You wrote:

> => Please remove NO_CCACHE_DEPEND from your desktop-make.conf and retry.

I cannot remove what is not there. 

Below URL is desktop-make.conf:
https://cloud.zyxst.net/~john/FreeBSD/ports/rawtherapee/desktop-make.conf

There's a reference to NO_CCACHE_DEPEND in /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.ccache.mk
I do not know how relevant this would be. I have never modified it.

I have never set NO_CCACHE_DEPEND manually anywhere, ever.

The problem as reported is worked around if these two lines are commented 
out in poudriere.conf :

CCACHE_DIR=/var/cache/ccache
CCACHE_STATIC_PREFIX=/usr/local

...which disables ccache for poudriere.

When poudriere is subsequently run, NO_CCACHE_DEPEND is absent from the log,
and rawtherapee builds as expected.

So, the issue remains as initially posted: rawtherapee will not build in a 
ccache-enabled poudriere.

You wrote:

> Please refrain from reopening the bug unless you can substantiate this is really a port bug 
> rather than the configuration error I have shown and pointed out.

I suspect the ccache lines/logic you pasted from rawtherapee's Makefile in comment #4 
are broken in some way. The configuration error you pointed out does not exist in
desktop-make.conf. NO_CCACHE_DEPEND appears to be controlled by enabling/disabling 
ccache support in poudriere.conf. rawtherapee will not build with ccache enabled 
in poudriere, whereas over 1400 other ports will.

For these reasons, I'm re-opening the bug report.
